About Me

Hey there, I am Adarsh Sharma, a Financial Freedom Coach. 


I am here to help Early Stage and Mid-Level corporate professionals, professionals like doctors, and small & medium businessmen achieve financial freedom without sacrificing their current lifestyle by helping them come out of debt trap and bringing Financial Stability using my 3-phase "Financial Freedom Blueprint". 


As of today, I manage an investment portfolio of more than 125 happy families. I have also guided more than 1000 people on Personal Finance by conducting various educational sessions.


I am a CERTIFIED FINANCIAL PLANNERCM Professional from the Financial Planning Standards Board - USA, Certified Alternative Investment Manager® from the Association of International Wealth Management of India, Retirement Advisor registered with the Pension Fund Regulatory & Development Authority of India, and Licentiate from the Insurance Institute of India.


Holding over 26 years of experience, I have worked with various renowned corporates including international assignments in Gulf and African regions.


I have a mission to help and empower more than 100,000 people to attain financial freedom using my unique model of the "Financial Freedom Blueprint".
